agentKnowledgeBase.description: Contains details about the knowledge base that has been associated with the agent.

agentActionGroup.description: Contains details about the action group that was created.

agentAlias.description: Contains details about the alias that was created.

executionRoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service role with permissions to create a flow. For more information, see Create a service role for flows in Amazon Bedrock in the Amazon Bedrock User Guide.

customerEncryptionKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the KMS key that you encrypted the flow with.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the flow.

status.description: The status of the flow. When you submit this request, the status will be NotPrepared. If creation fails, the status becomes Failed.

createdAt.description: The time at which the flow was created.

updatedAt.description: The time at which the flow was last updated.

version.description: The version of the flow. When you create a flow, the version created is the DRAFT version.

definition.description: A definition of the nodes and connections between nodes in the flow.

routingConfiguration.description: Contains information about the version that the alias is mapped to.

concurrencyConfiguration.description: The configuration that specifies how nodes in the flow are executed in parallel.

flowId.description: The unique identifier of the flow that the alias belongs to.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the alias.

createdAt.description: The time at which the alias was created.

updatedAt.description: The time at which the alias of the flow was last updated.

executionRoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service role with permissions to create a flow. For more information, see Create a service role for flows in Amazon Bedrock in the Amazon Bedrock User Guide.

customerEncryptionKeyArn.description: The KMS key that the flow is encrypted with.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the flow.

createdAt.description: The time at which the flow was created.

version.description: The version of the flow that was created. Versions are numbered incrementally, starting from 1.

definition.description: A definition of the nodes and connections in the flow.

customerEncryptionKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the KMS key that you encrypted the prompt with.

defaultVariant.description: The name of the default variant for your prompt.

variants.description: A list of objects, each containing details about a variant of the prompt.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the prompt.

version.description: The version of the prompt. When you create a prompt, the version created is the DRAFT version.

createdAt.description: The time at which the prompt was created.

updatedAt.description: The time at which the prompt was last updated.

customerEncryptionKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the KMS key to encrypt the version of the prompt.

defaultVariant.description: The name of the default variant for the prompt. This value must match the name field in the relevant PromptVariant object.

variants.description: A list of objects, each containing details about a variant of the prompt.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the version of the prompt.

version.description: The version of the prompt that was created. Versions are numbered incrementally, starting from 1.

createdAt.description: The time at which the prompt was created.

updatedAt.description: The time at which the prompt was last updated.

agentId.description: The unique identifier of the agent that was deleted.
The unique identifier of the agent that the alias belongs to.

agentAliasId.description: The unique identifier of the alias that was deleted.

agentId.description: The unique identifier of the agent that the version belongs to.

knowledgeBaseId.description: The unique identifier of the knowledge base to which the data source that was deleted belonged.

dataSourceId.description: The unique identifier of the data source that was deleted.

flowId.description: The unique identifier of the flow that the alias belongs to.

version.description: The version of the flow being deleted.

knowledgeBaseId.description: The unique identifier of the knowledge base that was deleted.

status.description: The status of the knowledge base and whether it has been successfully deleted.

documentDetails.description: A list of objects, each of which contains information about the documents that were deleted.

id.description: The unique identifier of the prompt that was deleted.

version.description: The version of the prompt that was deleted.

documentDetails.description: A list of objects, each of which contains information about the documents that were ingested.

agentId.description: The unique identifier of the agent for which the DRAFT version was created.

agentStatus.description: The status of the DRAFT version and whether it is ready for use.

preparedAt.description: The time at which the DRAFT version of the agent was last prepared.

status.description: The status of the flow. When you submit this request, the status will be NotPrepared. If preparation succeeds, the status becomes Prepared. If it fails, the status becomes FAILED.

ingestionJob.description: Contains information about the data ingestion job.
Contains information about the stopped data ingestion job.

agent.description: Contains details about the agent that was updated.

agentActionGroup.description: Contains details about the action group that was updated.

agentAlias.description: Contains details about the alias that was updated.

agentKnowledgeBase.description: Contains details about the knowledge base that has been associated with an agent.

executionRoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service role with permissions to create a flow. For more information, see Create a service role for flows in Amazon Bedrock in the Amazon Bedrock User Guide.

customerEncryptionKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the KMS key that the flow was encrypted with.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the flow.

status.description: The status of the flow. When you submit this request, the status will be NotPrepared. If updating fails, the status becomes Failed.

createdAt.description: The time at which the flow was created.

updatedAt.description: The time at which the flow was last updated.

version.description: The version of the flow. When you update a flow, the version updated is the DRAFT version.

definition.description: A definition of the nodes and the connections between nodes in the flow.

routingConfiguration.description: Contains information about the version that the alias is mapped to.

concurrencyConfiguration.description: The configuration that specifies how nodes in the flow are executed in parallel.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the flow.

createdAt.description: The time at which the flow was created.

updatedAt.description: The time at which the alias was last updated.

customerEncryptionKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the KMS key to encrypt the prompt.

defaultVariant.description: The name of the default variant for the prompt. This value must match the name field in the relevant PromptVariant object.

variants.description: A list of objects, each containing details about a variant of the prompt.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the prompt.

version.description: The version of the prompt. When you update a prompt, the version updated is the DRAFT version.

createdAt.description: The time at which the prompt was created.

updatedAt.description: The time at which the prompt was last updated.

validations.description: Contains an array of objects, each of which contains an error identified by validation.
